title: subworkflow - kubernetes remediate resume argo rollout
description:
Subworkflow: Resume paused Argo rollout after manual hold.

This Kubernetes remediation subworkflow creates a remediation Job through Dynatrace Kubernetes actions, waits for completion, and verifies success before returning.

Parameters
primaryResourceId (Required): Primary Kubernetes resource identifier targeted by remediation.
clusterName (Required): Kubernetes cluster name for context and auditing.
namespace (Required): Namespace where remediation should execute.
targetName (Required): Target workload/resource name for the remediation.
dynatracekubernetesconnection (Required): Dynatrace Kubernetes connection name.

This workflow never fire-and-forgets and always performs wait plus success verification.
guide:
## 🛠️ Kubernetes Remediation Subworkflow

This subworkflow remediates a common Kubernetes outage scenario by creating a short-lived remediation Job and validating successful completion.

### 🎯 Purpose
- Resume paused Argo rollout after manual hold.

### ⚙️ Parameters
- 🔑 **primaryResourceId** (Required): Primary resource ID for auditing and traceability.
- ☸️ **clusterName** (Required): Cluster where remediation executes.
- 📁 **namespace** (Required): Namespace of the target workload/resource.
- 🧾 **targetName** (Required): Target workload/resource name.
- 🔌 **dynatracekubernetesconnection** (Required): Dynatrace Kubernetes connection.

### ▶️ Execution Behavior
- ▶️ Creates Kubernetes Job **dt-remediate-resume-argo-rollouts** using Dynatrace Kubernetes action.
- ⏳ Waits for Job completion through dependency subworkflow.
- ✅ Verifies Job succeeded and fails otherwise.

### 📋 Remediation Command
- kubectl -n {{ input()["namespace"] }} argo rollouts resume {{ input()["targetName"] }}

### 🔗 Dependencies
- 📎 Requires subworkflow **subworkflow - kubernetes wait for job**.

wait-for-kubernetes-job-completed.name: wait-for-kubernetes-job-completed
wait-for-kubernetes-job-completed.description: Wait for Kubernetes remediation Job completion.

check-status.name: check-status
check-status.description: Final verification of remediation Job success.
